name: Cohen Development Gas & Oil Ltd
summary: Cohen Development Gas & Oil Ltd engages in the natural oil and gas business. It holds interests in the Ashkelon, Noa, Tamar, Dalit, North Whale, South Whale, Block 12, Shark, Crocdilem Olshas/367, New Horizon/ 405, and New Yahel/406 licenses. Cohen Development Gas & Oil Ltd was founded in 1958 and is based in Herzliya, Israel.
